title: 临考救急编排流
flow: Detect exam rescue and review plan intents
Compress review scope and build timebox plan
Ask whether the plan is too full
demoHighlight: Shows how an urgent multimodal request becomes a compressed task plan instead of a long lesson.

title: 截图解题编排流
flow: Detect solve problem and concept explanation intents
demoHighlight: Shows how solving a screenshot is split into recognition, concept, solution, and feedback.

title: 模糊输入追问流
demoHighlight: Shows that the system avoids guessing when the input object is missing.

title: 先判断优先级流
demoHighlight: Shows priority judgment as its own first-class task, not just a side note.

title: 反馈后调整计划流
flow: Detect feedback adjustment and scope compression intents
Ask whether the new plan is acceptable
demoHighlight: Shows the feedback loop changing the next plan instead of repeating the original plan.

title: 多图学习路线流
flow: Detect learning route and priority intents
demoHighlight: Shows how several visible learning objects become an ordered route.
